E10 - The Metal Detector Badge
programme.desc: Roly needs a wee, but the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key. Not to worry, Duggee has his metal detector.

programme.title: E4 - What's Hot?
programme.desc: Billy and the Sillies introduce a visit to chicken A&E, the Squirrels build a bug house, Norrie has her chance to shine, and the Penguins give facts about what's hot and what's not.

programme.title: E23 - Family Meeting
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: E94 - Day Trip
programme.desc: The Teletubbies go on a day trip to the Hidey Hup. They take turns on The Tubby Bouncy, The Tubby Slidey and The Tubby Spinny before they go on The Tubby Uppy Downy together.

programme.title: E28 - Dog Loves Calm
programme.desc: Dog and Pug escape a very noisy Bookshop to find Granny Pug who is leading a mediation retreat. They are trying to find a peaceful spot.

programme.title: E17 - The Chickening
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo have to carry Jackson's big blue 'chicken' Ludwig (who definitely isn't a chicken) to the country fair. But the easily-startled bird gets away from them - the chase is on!

programme.title: E19 - It's Time For A Sleepover
programme.desc: JoJo has a sleepover at Gran Gran's but is confused when bedtime comes while it's still light outside! Gran Gran creates their own starry sky for JoJo.

programme.title: E33 - Bubble Bumbling
programme.desc: The Bubble Man is in town so a visit to the Big Shop is in order for Sarah, Duck and Donkey.

programme.title: E25 - Taxi
programme.desc: Bluey is running a taxi service. Her first passenger is Businessman Dad, who is in a rush to get to the airport. But with unexpected delays, Dad's in danger of missing his flight!

programme.title: E12 - Pea's Power Suit
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Supertato, the world's first potato superhero as he tackles the mischievous Evil Pea, in the supermarket aisles.

programme.desc: The Squirrels lose Tag in the Clubhouse but to find him they're going to have to figure out where the Lost Property room is.

programme.desc: Mojo and Bo have to carry Jackson's big blue 'chicken' Ludwig (who definitely isn't a chicken) to the country fair. But the easily-startled bird gets away from them - the chase is on!

programme.title: E19 - It's Time For A Sleepover
programme.desc: JoJo has a sleepover at Gran Gran's but is confused when bedtime comes while it's still light outside! Gran Gran creates their own starry sky for JoJo.

programme.title: E33 - Bubble Bumbling
programme.desc: The Bubble Man is in town so a visit to the Big Shop is in order for Sarah, Duck and Donkey.

programme.title: E25 - Taxi
programme.desc: Bluey is running a taxi service. Her first passenger is Businessman Dad, who is in a rush to get to the airport. But with unexpected delays, Dad's in danger of missing his flight!

programme.title: E12 - Pea's Power Suit
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Supertato, the world's first potato superhero as he tackles the mischievous Evil Pea, in the supermarket aisles.

programme.title: E12 - The Lost Property Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels lose Tag in the Clubhouse but to find him they're going to have to figure out where the Lost Property room is.

programme.title: E2 - Obstacle Course
programme.desc: Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her. After cheating in a rematch, Bluey discovers the importance of training in order to improve her skills.

programme.title: E9 - Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: E27 - Go Jet Academy: Rainbow
programme.desc: After a rainbow appears over the Go Jet Academy, Glitch becomes fascinated with the legend of a pot of gold appearing at the end of it.

programme.title: E50 - Grandad
programme.desc: Grandad is supposed to be resting, but when Bluey and Bingo go to visit him, he makes a run for it with the kids and takes them on a madcap adventure into the bush.

programme.title: E14 - Perfect
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.desc: There has been a power cut and the squirrels use their torches to make shadows.

programme.title: The B Side S2
programme.desc: Get ready to explore the hidden world of your favorite celebrities as they share their passions and personal tales beyond the limelight! Hosted by Bianca Gonzalez, this is your exclusive peek into the 'other side' of your idols and icons!

programme.title: The B Side S2
programme.desc: Get ready to explore the hidden world of your favorite celebrities as they share their passions and personal tales beyond the limelight! Hosted by Bianca Gonzalez, this is your exclusive peek into the 'other side' of your idols and icons!

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: E5 - Hot Springs Pack
programme.desc: Meet a close-knit family of wild dogs who work together to raise pups and hunt enough food to feed the whole pack. While their well-coordinated hunts are successful, the wet season brings challenges when some of the team strikes out on their own.

programme.title: E2 - Saltwater Crocodile
programme.desc: Navigate a mangrove forest in Borneo with the saltwater crocodile, which is perfectly suited to life among the watery roots. Discover how this reptile uses the environment to regulate its temperature and why its epic patience makes it a super hunter.

programme.title: E5 - Sloth Bear
programme.desc: Peek inside the secret world of the fearless, often misunderstood sloth bear. Travel to Sri Lanka with Max and discover how this fierce, shaggy animal fights off leopards and other deadly rivals, all while trying to secure enough protein to survive.

programme.title: E2 - The Great Divide
programme.desc: Created by titanic forces and spanning 3,700 km along the eastern edge of Australia, the Great Dividing Range separates two very different worlds. Aerial footage and intimate studies reveal how species survive and thrive in this mountain home.

programme.title: After the Wildfires
programme.desc: Examine fire’s pivotal role in shaping Australia’s natural world. Tour the devastation left by 2020’s brutal bush-fire season, learn how climate change fuelled this watershed event, and chart the long-term recovery of the continent’s wildlife.

programme.title: E4 - Ice
programme.desc: Trek to the planet’s quickly melting poles, where animals are giving scientists clues about our future existence. Learn how the movements of polar bears, penguins, and other arctic creatures could help humans map (and prevent) global warming.

programme.title: Boss Shark: Battle of the Sexes

programme.title: Dreamscapes, Architectural Wonders (II)
programme.desc: DREAMSCAPES, ARCHITECTURAL WONDERS: From simple residential cottage, impressive royal mansion to magnificent skyscraper, behind those bricks and steel structure, it is the historical and cultural designs that make them immortal. programme.title: Sunday Sports News
programme.desc: Wraps-up Sunday's sporting events with a guest commentator for an easy-to-understand approach to sports news.

programme.title: Ninja Art Of Heart, Popomaru!
programme.desc: A fun ninja drama where parents and children can explore emotional growth together! The story follows Shinobi, an elementary school ninja, as she teams up with Popomaru -- the playful spirit of emotions -- to learn a creative way of understanding feelings and building positive relationships with those around her. Join her on an exciting journey to discover how to handle emotions with skill and joy!

programme.title: Project X: The Challengers-New Beginnings 'Roasted Sweet Potato'
programme.desc: Project X returns for the first time in 18 years. The former series featured people involved in project related to the Japanese industry and contemporary history. The new series focuses on people in the “Lost Era” following the collapse of the bubble economy. In every era, there are always those take on challenges. Even without receiving praise or being in the spotlight, some dedicate themselves to their work. The documentary delivers passion and courage right to you.

programme.title: Tere Payal Mere Geet
programme.desc: Premi, a bachelor poet, falls for a woman at Durga Devi's temple. Fatefully, he later finds her singing his poem at a dance hall.

programme.title: Raju Ban Gaya Gentleman
programme.desc: Raju comes to Bombay chasing his dreams, but keeps losing out on opportunities. His love, Renu helps him find a job. Success goes to his head until one day a tragic accident destroys his reputation.

programme.title: Na Tum Jaano Na Hum
programme.desc: A romantically inclined couple decide to get to know each other through letters without disclosing their identities.

programme.title: E15 - Bites Of Fantasy
programme.desc: Dining out takes flight into the world of fantasy when host Michael Yo shows us that make-believe experiences can be really tasty. First stop is a restaurant in New York City's Financial District.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: Despite the intense summer heat, Na-rae brings a crowd to Palbok-dong while loudly promoting the area. But of cours, things don't go as planned. The team changes plans and heads to Deokjin Park instead.

programme.title: E14 - Geralyn And Art
programme.desc: After recovering from cancer, Geralyn's doctor encouraged her to embrace life with husband Art. Their journey leads to the ocean, where they are on a hunt to find a home that truly speaks to them.

programme.title: E14 - Give Me A Sign
programme.desc: An unassuming night out with her girlfriends yields one of the most emotional and surprising readings, as Theresa delivers messages to a skeptical woman grieving the shocking loss of her pregnant daughter.

programme.title: Secret Life Of The Surgeon's Wife
programme.desc: When Julia suspects her dental surgeon husband is having an affair, she works to obtain proof before she can initiate a divorce rather than risk losing control of the charity they've built together.

programme.title: There's A New Killer In Town
programme.desc: Alice is living a quiet life in a small town when she meets Ronnie. The two become fast friends, but soon Holly, another of Alice's friends, suspects there is more to Ronnie than meets the eye.

programme.title: E4 - JJ’s Earth Week Recycling Mission
programme.desc: Join JJ for an Earth Week recycling mission! The neighborhood recycling truck arrives, & JJ learns how to sort trash into the right bins. Then, discover the magic of composting to feed the earth! The eco-fun continues as the family rushes to collect recyclables before the truck leaves. Plus, explore the solar system, go on a rainbow scavenger hunt & become a junior scout on a camping trip!

programme.title: E5 - Earth Week Nature Explorers
programme.desc: Join JJ & Cody as Earth Week nature explorers! Cody’s family goes on an autumn hike, playing in the leaves & making owl murals. Then, JJ & Cody turn a stream into a racetrack for walnut sailboats! The exploration continues as JJ captivates a butterfly, discovers tadpoles in the pond & becomes a junior scout on a camping trip. Plus, help the family rush to get the recycling out in time!

programme.title: E4 - JJ’s Earth Week Recycling Mission
programme.desc: Join JJ for an Earth Week recycling mission! The neighborhood recycling truck arrives, & JJ learns how to sort trash into the right bins. Then, discover the magic of composting to feed the earth! The eco-fun continues as the family rushes to collect recyclables before the truck leaves. Plus, explore the solar system, go on a rainbow scavenger hunt & become a junior scout on a camping trip!

programme.title: E3 - The Ultimate Outdoor Play Day!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate outdoor play day! Mummy & Daddy take the kids to the park to fly colorful Japanese koinobori kites. Then, Mia & Max head to the pond to feed the ducks, but are shocked to find there are no ducks there! They must go on an adventure to find them. The outdoor fun continues as Mummy sets up a painting session in the park, where the kids have fun discovering new colors with their fingers, hands & feet!

programme.title: E4 - Using Your Brains to Save the Day!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he uses his brains to save the day! When he overloads the carwash with bubble mix, he gets trapped in a giant bubble & floats away! He has to use all his smarts to find a way back down. Then, when Amber the Ambulance crashes & can't move, there's a big emergency! Buster has to muster up his courage & become a 'Hero Ambulance Bus' to save his best friend Scout from a broken bridge.

programme.title: E1 - From Dinosaurs To Pet Knights!
programme.desc: Blippi is on an adventure from dinosaurs to pet knights! He travels back in time with Tabbs to help a little Microraptor prove that being small has its benefits when they rescue a giant sauropod from the mud. Then, they head to the African savannah to learn how to roar, sneak & pounce like a lion! Back at the clubhouse, Blippi learns how to interpret a puppy's tail wags & even travels back in time again to help a real-life knight in shining armor—who happens to be a corgi!

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.title: E7 - Twinkle's Bedtime Lullaby
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won't find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today's world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ''living in the future'!

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ''living in the future'!

programme.title: Talk Africa
programme.desc: Talk Africa is a weekly discussion show that brings the most influential voices in Africa to the world.

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. programme.title: E6 - Ready-To-Wear Fashion Shows/Ai In Fashion/Le Chemin Des Maquettes
programme.desc: A look back at the ready-to-wear shows for Autumn-Winter 2025-2026 from Mossi Traore to Paco Rabanne and Enfants Riches Deprimes. AI is making its mark in fashion as stylists, art directors and clothing designers. Le Chemin des Maquettes makes metal fashion pieces for some of the world's top designers.

programme.title: E3 - Mouscron
programme.desc: Wallonie picarde stop! Mouscron borders both France and the linguistic frontier: Aalbeke and Rekkem separate it from the Flemish region. Visits to the Marcel Marlier Centre, the creator of ''Martine'', the Castle of the Counts, the nature reserve, and the Blue Fountain.

programme.title: E5 - Halloween At The Castle
programme.desc: The Chateau d'Helecine gets into the Halloween spirit with multimedia shows, from the park to the orangery, including the main courtyard and the dome. Also featured: a friendly meeting between Salvatore Adamo and Michel Drucker; watchmaker Gilles Clavareau; and Thierry Verhoeven's kumquat gin.

programme.title: E13 - Weinsanto
programme.desc: Humour, fantasy and a flair for the spectacular all describe Victor Weinsanto's designs. He presents his autumn-winter 2023-2024 ready to wear show.

programme.title: E85
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: E16 - The Maritime Saga Of The Barreau Brothers
programme.desc: The 'Grain de Sail' is a one-of-a-kind cargo sailboat. From Saint-Malo to New York, it transports 50 tons of wine, coffee and chocolate. Jacques and Olivier Barreau are behind this initiative and have chosen carbon-neutral maritime transport, all by the force of the wind.

programme.title: E91
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E12 - Kentucky Farewell
programme.desc: All season the chefs have been growing gardens at their Kentucky estate. Tom ambushes the sleeping chefs and challenges them to reap what they sowed and make a dish focused on their garden harvest. Then, for the last elimination challenge in Kentucky, the chefs head to Keeneland, a thoroughbred horse auction house, to bid on luxury ingredients for dishes to show gratitude to their culinary mentors. Chefs Bryan Voltaggio, Gavin Kaysen, JD Fratzke, Kim Alter, David Posey and Chris Coombs join the judges to see how far the Chefs have come and who deserves to go to Macau for the finals.

programme.title: E22 - Guano In 60 Seconds
programme.desc: Charles Darwin Middle School becomes condemned because of bat guano, and all the classes get moved into a portable.

programme.title: E9 - Can't Knock The Hustle
programme.desc: The Banks family goes to church; Will considers taking the opportunity to find his father, unknowingly driving a wedge between Phil and Geoffrey.

programme.title: E12 - King Midas And The Golden Touch
programme.desc: Catch this animated program about King Midas and his ability to turn anything into gold, done in an R&B musical style.

programme.title: E11 - Ice Cream Headache
programme.desc: The campers get magical powers from the witches supply of magic ice cream.

programme.title: E12 - Kentucky Farewell
programme.desc: All season the chefs have been growing gardens at their Kentucky estate. programme.title: E18 - Computer Vampire
programme.desc: Oscar finds a mysterious old video game in the library.

programme.title: E13 - Ain't Too Proud To Egg
programme.desc: In a school assignment designed to teach responsibility, Adam, Jake and the gang are given eggs to care for.

programme.title: The Golden Compass
programme.desc: A girl must use her magic compass to seek children, who are kidnapped in a ploy that would endanger the world.

programme.title: E13 - Holy Macau!
programme.desc: The final five chefs travel to the Chinese territory of Macau for the remaining battles of the competition. Judge Graham Elliot, who has a restaurant in Macau, introduces the Chefs to the local market full of fascinating ingredients and challenges them to a Quickfire highlighting unique Macanese proteins. Then, the chefs throw a party celebrating Chinese New Year. Since it is the Year of the Pig, the dishes must feature pork products and be delicious enough to impress Hong Kong’s super chef Jowett Yu along with Tom, Padma and Graham.

Banquet
programme.desc: Howler and Dove are invited to Lord Roach's banquet. But banquets come with all kinds of rules and regulations, exposing the greedier guests in the room! Hardened foodies, they indulge in all kinds of scheming.

programme.title: The Yoko Workout
programme.desc: The kids train for the upcoming Yoko Park Obstacle Course, and learn that there are many different ways to stay active and healthy!

programme.title: An A-mazing Winter Adventure
programme.desc: The kids must find their way out of Yoko's magical snow labyrinth in order to get to Ranger Loops' puppet show on time!

programme.title: Repair Socks
programme.desc: As the Grimwade boys sort through the laundry, a pile of odd socks emerges. In a family of eight, that is no surprise. Perhaps there is something they can do about it? Let's find out!

programme.title: New Names
programme.desc: Can the Junior Vets determine the sex of a very special penguin? Six cute kittens need checkups and new names - meet X-ray, Smudge, and, of course, baby Johnny! And Paul, the rat, has trouble breathing.

programme.title: Eric's Bear Paws
programme.desc: Eric learns that many animals have developed an insulating coat of fat to keep them warm and dry. He uses this idea to create a way to put his hand in very cold water without getting hurt.

programme.title: Sweet 16
programme.desc: The pressure is on for speed skater Izzy, who's been picked to train with the Olympic squad. How will she do when she is up against her skating idol Elise Christie? And there's a surprise in store for birthday girl Kloe.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: Cardboard Box
programme.desc: Hmm all these boxes? What can we do? let's just say we have some 'speedy'' ideas .

programme.title: No Foolin' Fico
programme.desc: Fico loves practical jokes. When his friend Gotcha Garcia invites them to a tomato-throwing festival, they're skeptical. Is La Tomatina a real festival? Curious, they set off to Bunol, Spain. The festival proves to be real, but Anabella won't give the tomatoes back.

programme.title: No Foolin' Fico
programme.desc: Fico loves practical jokes. When his friend Gotcha Garcia invites them to a tomato-throwing festival, they're skeptical. Is La Tomatina a real festival? Curious, they set off to Bunol, Spain. The festival proves to be real, but Anabella won't give the tomatoes back.

programme.title: The It Kid
programme.desc: Naomi's a contestant on Clay TV's “The It Kid,” with cameras tracking her every move. She tries to show how cool and caring she is-until Jessi's quirky charm steals the spotlight. As Jessi climbs the votes, Naomi scrambles to win back the attention she's lost.

programme.title: Fossil Finds
programme.desc: Eric learns that fossils are like fingerprints left behind by prehistoric plants or animals. He makes some modern-day fossils using toy dinosaurs and flour.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met....a Hot Air Balloon
programme.desc: Henry meets a hot air balloon at a summery country fair. Hot-air balloon is tired of just going up and down all day.

programme.title: Spectroscopes and Light
programme.desc: What do atmospheric particles do in the sky? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of radiation. Have hands-on fun by creating a weather system in a jar, and get to know C.V. Raman, a physicist, who discovered that scattered light can change wavelength.

programme.title: Painted Lady Butterfly
programme.desc: Binah has her hands full with Grandad, who's acting all grumpy and claiming that butterflies are just 'fancy moths.' Fleabag and Plop explore their artistic sides as they each attempt to paint a Painted Lady butterfly.

programme.title: My Mini Bakes: Mini Baking Sensation
programme.desc: Emma Salt meets My Mini Bakes - a viral sensation on the social media platform TikTok and holder of the GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the fastest time to assemble twenty mini hamburgers! What will be the one thing Emma learns from this encounter with My Mini Bakes?

programme.title: Preparing for Mars
programme.desc: Emily talks to scientists about the next stop in our solar system – Mars. She meets Curiosity, the rover currently exploring Mars and unlocking its mysteries. And at the Mars Desert Research Station, a group of students find out what it could be like to live on Mars.

programme.title: Fossil Finds
programme.desc: Eric learns that fossils are like fingerprints left behind by prehistoric plants or animals. He makes some modern-day fossils using toy dinosaurs and flour.

programme.title: Quitting's Not An Option
programme.desc: Artistic gymnast Madi has not had luck on her side as she has recently suffered an injury. Thankfully, she is now back to full fitness and is off to her grading competition to see if she can pass the tests and qualify as an elite gymnast.

programme.title: The Keeper (Maddie Hinch) and The Explorer (Ranulph Fiennes)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, the world's best field hockey goalkeeper and Olympic gold medallist, Maddie Hinch, and the world's greatest living explorer, Ranulph Fiennes, share their record breaking journeys.

programme.title: Eric's Bear Paws
programme.desc: Eric learns that many animals have developed an insulating coat of fat to keep them warm and dry. He uses this idea to create a way to put his hand in very cold water without getting hurt.

programme.title: Red Blood and Old Bones
programme.desc: The doctors investigate how oxygen works in your blood, and Dr. Xand takes a look at some diseased bones and organs. In the emergency room, there's a patient who had a bike accident and another with an infected finger.

programme.title: From Zero to Hero
programme.desc: What's the most powerful number in the universe? One million? One billion? One trillion? No, it's zero! In this episode we explain why by focusing on the role of zero as a placeholder for large numbers.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: E3 - Have Goat Will Travel
programme.desc: A couple goes on a road trip to honour their goat's late best friend. They visit a goat conference, explore nature, and plan to scatter the goat's ashes.

programme.title: E8 - Disease
programme.desc: In the wake of Covid-19, it's more apparent now than ever the impact of disease and infection can have on the world.

programme.title: Creatures Of Darkness
programme.desc: Go on a journey to unfathomable ocean depths, subterranean caverns and the deepest lakes to explain how the exotic creatures that live there thrive.

programme.title: E9 - To Catch A Monitor
programme.desc: Coyote and his crew venture through the Outback in search of two iconic monitor species.

programme.title: Extinct Or Alive: Jaws Of Alaska
programme.desc: International wildlife biologist Forrest Galante travels the world in search of rare and elusive wildlife, including those lost to science.

programme.title: E7 - Camouflage
programme.desc: To master the art of disguise is an impossible feat for many but, for these universal soldiers, it's the weapon that makes them experts at hunting and hiding.

programme.title: Reign of Assassins
programme.desc: In 428AD, Bodhi, Prince of Southern India, becomes a Buddhist monk and sets off for China, earning a hallowed reputation as a mystical martial artist. Following his death, his remains mysteriously disappear. It is rumored that his remains contain the secret to obtaining limitless power and ruling the martial arts world. Centuries later, The Dark Stone emerges as a team of deadly assassins; their best assassin is the ruthless, invincible Drizzle. On her latest mission, Drizzle takes out Zhang Haiduan, a high-ranking court official. Zhang's son, Renfeng, while mourning his father's death, is also attacked and seemingly killed by Drizzle and her fellow assassins. Drizzle's life changes when she kills Lu Zhu, a monk with whom she has unintentionally fallen in love...

programme.title: Movie Craftsmen -Cheung Siu Fai
programme.desc: Cheung Siu Fai, who started his career in television, won the appreciation of director Johnnie To with his precise and solid performance and participated in hit films such as “Running On Karma”, “Election” and “Exiled”. In this episode, Siu Fai is invited to disassemble the design of his classic characters, talk about his friend-and-mentor-like relationship with Johnnie To and share his steadily progressing acting career.

programme.title: Exhuma
programme.desc: In Los Angeles, the renowned shaman Hwa-rim and her protege Bong-gil are commissioned with a hefty sum to meet the enigmatic descendants of a household afflicted by a peculiar illness. Sensing the ominous aura surrounding the ancestral grave, Hwa-rim urges for its relocation. The best geomancer in the business, Sang-duk, and mortician Young-geun, lured by the scent of money, join the team. The mysterious grave, situated in an unapproachable sacred ground, holds dark secrets. Though Sang-duk senses an ominous presence and initially rejects the proposal, Hwa-rim's persuasion ultimately initiates the exhumation, leading to a journey where the team must confront both supernatural forces and their own fears.

programme.title: Stuntman
programme.desc: LEE Sam was the undisputed king of stunt choreography during the golden era of Hong Kong action cinema in the 80s. After a devastating stunt accident, Sam steps away from the industry for 30 years. However, his old friend, a veteran director, has now persuaded Sam to work as the stunt choreographer on what will be the director's last film. The only catch is that his film stars Wai - Sam's former stunt crew member who has since become a famous action star in his own right. Sam and Wai have a contentious history, with Sam's infamously overbearing and demanding personality clashing with Wai's own ego and ambition. By chance, Sam crosses paths with a young, ambitious stuntman named LEE Sai Long, who sees this as an opportunity to advance his career. Long is caught between Sam and his former protege turned rival. At the same time, Long helps Sam to reconcile with his estranged daughter, Cherry. As Sam returns to the world he once dominated, he must confront his past, mend fences w

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills season 15 kicks off on Monday,Housewives Erika Jayne, Dorit Kemsley, Kyle Richards, Bozoma Saint John, and Sutton Stracke return for a season marked by fresh starts, major fallouts and unforgettable adventures. New housewife and fashion mogul Rachel Zoe makes a dazzling return to Bravo after more than a decade. Single and stepping back into the spotlight on her own terms, she's ready to unveil RZ 2.0 to the world. Also joining the group is housewife Amanda Frances, a self-made businesswoman who lives in her friend Kyle Richards' former family home. She's determined to build her future in the land of fame and fortune.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: It features two families who compete to name the most popular answers to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: Dr. Wai In 'The Scripture With No Words'
programme.desc: “The Scripture With No Words” had been lost for a long time. Everybody was eager to find it, even the ambitious Japanese. Dr. Wai was antiquarian. Having seen the mysterious “Wooden Horse”, lost control and killing people, he quit his job. However, being supported by his friend, Dr. Wai recovered and resumed to his work. He went to Shanghai trying to locate “The Scripture With No Words” and he discovered that it was in the possession of the leader of “Gang of Salt”. And the game begin...

E7 - Wander Woman
programme.desc: After losing both her parents and battling an eating disorder, Paige turns to an adventure with Bear Grylls to regain her confidence in life. On this emotional journey, she reconnects with herself and the memories of her outdoor-loving dad.

programme.title: E5 - 105
programme.desc: Today on Million Dollar House Hunt we meet house hunter Bec and her son Quin who are looking for a multi million dollar property in Toorak, Melbourne

programme.title: E7 - Deal Breaker
programme.desc: Claudia turns to her dad Steve for help when she fears the biggest sale of her mining career is slipping through her fingers.

programme.title: E4 - Ben Stiller
programme.desc: World-renowned survivalist Bear Grylls meets actor Ben Stiller (The Secret Life of Walter Mitty (2013)) on the rugged mountains of the Isle of Skye in Northern Scotland, to go on a once in a lifetime adventure. As they explore their surroundings, Bear tests Ben's limits in an effort to see how he measures up to the unpredictable and unforgiving challenges of Mother Nature.

programme.desc: Jack travels to landlocked Zagreb in Croatia to cook fish and chips for hungry locals and a politician. Will they like his version of the internationally renowned meal?

programme.desc: Hauling a 20-tonne boulder on the treacherous road out of the mine proves too much for their old truck 6-Pack.

programme.title: E5 - Highlights 5
programme.desc: In the penultimate stretch of their journey, the four remaining celebrities must find and eat the fruits of the forest, carefully separating nutritious treats from any potentially deadly dinners. After that, they endure another stormy night and face their most extreme challenge yet - crossing a 200ft ravine one by one on a rope. Bear also tests their ability to start a fire using only bamboo poles, knives and flints, before deciding which three he will take through to the Bear Grylls: Mission Survive final.

programme.title: E5 - Don’t Look Down
programme.desc: The contestants are flown by helicopter to their next journey amidst a torrential downpour where they must cross a rope suspended one hundred feet above a deep gorge. The extreme height, and harsh camping conditions, test the teams.

programme.title: E8 - Zagreb
programme.desc: Jack travels to landlocked Zagreb in Croatia to cook fish and chips for hungry locals and a politician. Will they like his version of the internationally renowned meal?

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine.

programme.title: The Specialist
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone and Sharon Stone star in this hard-edged thriller about an ex-CIA explosives expert (Stallone) who helps a seductive beauty (Stone) avenge the murder of her parents by a powerful Cuban-American crime boss.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine.

programme.title: Notting Hill
programme.desc: Julia Roberts and Hugh Grant star in this delightful romantic comedy about a world-famous movie star who falls in love with a bookstore owner while the whole world watches.

programme.title: Fargo (1996)
programme.desc: Minnesota car salesman Jerry Lundegaard's inept crime falls apart due to his and his henchmen's bungling and the persistent police work of the quite pregnant Marge Gunderson.

programme.desc: The best tunes in Korea! the most sensational music show on TV satisfies all your senses! Fantastic performances and Awe-inspiring harmony by the nation's top musicians! Follow the latest trend in the Korean music scene through the K-chart, a summary of the week's hottest songs.

programme.title: E316
programme.desc: Gourmet celebrities team up to explore the world of convenience stores and share their secret recipes!

programme.title: E322
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.desc: Parenting challenges of 'Superman' , the first hero that children encounter when they are born.

programme.desc: Steven Greg and Garnet take a trip out of town.

programme.title: E2 - 京東大鼓傳承人忘詞淚崩
programme.desc: 由張紹剛與熒熒、陳爍等嘉賓主持組成學習團的一檔兒童脱口秀節目，一同走入「了不起學校」，發掘每個了不起孩子身上的天真、萌趣和了不起的技能。

programme.title: E10 - 付出的真心變笑話？
programme.desc: 以「尋找勢均力敵的參與者」為核心模式，通過團隊協作任務獲取生存物資，個人競技爭奪約會權，並設置淘汰機制與心動投票綁定規則；素人嘉賓們將逃離都市，直面愛情與生存的挑戰，在人群中尋找勢均力敵的彼此。

E1
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。
